title: Persona restoration byte-equality
description: 三份 codex.txt md5 一致

title: instructions field byte-stable across two delta turns
description: 同 session 同 driver 連續兩 delta=true turn，outbound instructions hash 一致

given.session_state: established codex session, single account, no model switch, no driver change

covers: Requirement: instructions Field Carries Driver Only

title: input[0] is developer-role bundle with required ordering
description: input[] 第一個 item 是 developer role，內容序：RoleIdentity → OpencodeProtocolInstructions → AppsInstructions → AvailableSkillsInstructions

given.session_state: session with SYSTEM.md loaded, MCP apps registered, 2 active skills

when: intercept outbound request body, parse input[0]
covers: Requirement: input[] Begins With Developer + User Bundle

title: input[1] is user-role bundle with AGENTS.md + EnvironmentContext
description: input[] 第二個 item 是 user role，內容序：UserInstructions(global) → UserInstructions(project) → EnvironmentContext
when: intercept outbound request body, parse input[1]
covers: Requirement: input[] Begins With Developer + User Bundle

title: prompt_cache_key is pure threadId
description: rotate accountId 前後 prompt_cache_key 不變

title: Cache recovery in healthy delta mode
description: Healthy delta turn cached_tokens >= 0.9 * input_tokens 從第二 turn 開始

given.session_state: fresh codex session, clean working dir, single account, no rotations

title: Legacy CONTEXT PREFACE removed from outbound
description: 任何 outbound input[] item 的 text 都不含 '## CONTEXT PREFACE'
when: intercept outbound request body, scan input[] all text content

title: RoleIdentity reflects subagent vs main
description: subagent session 的 RoleIdentity body 含 'Current Role: Subagent'，main 含 'Current Role: Main Agent'

title: Plugin transform regression
description: experimental.chat.system.transform plugin 仍能修改 driver text

title: Daemon upgrade triggers chain reset
description: Daemon 啟動偵測 legacy continuation state → broadcast resetWsSession
